title: Department Manager Vacancy at FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd:
FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld Consulting Pvt Ltd!
